name: Earthshaker
description: There may be many earths, but there's only one Earthshaker. Raigor Stonehoof, the Earthshaker.

abilities.name: Slugger
abilities.description: Turns enemy heroes killed into projectiles that travel in a straight line from its origin position, and deals damage to all enemy units it passes through. The higher Earthshaker's level, the greater the damage value per unit death.

abilities.name: Fissure
abilities.description: Applies of Earthshaker's corresponding ability level when acquired.

abilities.name: Enchant Totem
abilities.description: Empowers Earthshaker's totem, causing it to deal extra damage and grants bonus attack range on the next attack.

abilities.name: Aftershock
abilities.description: Causes the earth to shake underfoot, adding additional damage and stuns to nearby enemy units when Earthshaker casts his abilities.

abilities.name: Echo Slam
abilities.description: Creates shockwaves that travel through the ground, damaging enemy units. Affected enemy heroes releases two echos.
